Solana trading bot for Telegram groups

SlimeWire gives groups a cleaner path from token scans and calls into charts, alerts, raid cards, proof pages, launch rooms, and the trading terminal.

Add @SlimeWiredBotSee raid bot

Group workflows

Scan cards

Turn a CA into chart links, token context, and next actions.

Launch rooms

Help launch teams organize attention without losing the trading path.

Raid cards

Make community action clearer and more measurable.

Proof links

Give calls and outcomes a shareable home outside chat noise.

Terminal handoff

Let serious traders move from Telegram into deeper review.

Less spam

Good group tooling filters noise and keeps high-signal actions visible.

FAQ

What should a Solana trading bot for groups do?

It should help group members scan tokens, open charts, follow calls, view proof, receive alerts, and move into the terminal without cluttering the chat.

Can group bots help launches?

Yes. Launch rooms, raid cards, proof pages, and alert handoff can make a launch easier for traders to inspect.

Should every alert be posted to a group?

No. Group workflows work best when noisy alerts are filtered and only useful scan, proof, launch, or raid items are posted.
